invariant_descriptions.STAKE-0: Agent MUST have balance >= MIN_STAKE before stake() commits. InsufficientStakeError raised otherwise.
invariant_descriptions.STAKE-CAP-0: Staked amount is capped at MAX_STAKE_FRACTION (20%) of pre-stake balance. No single proposal can consume the agent's full reserves.
invariant_descriptions.STAKE-BURN-0: resolve(passed=False) burns 100% of staked_amount. Burned stake is never returned regardless of fitness outcome. StakeAlreadyResolvedError raised on double-resolution.
invariant_descriptions.STAKE-PERSIST-0: _persist() uses Path.open('a') append mode — never builtins.open. Wallet writes use json.dumps(sort_keys=True) for replay determinism.

notes: Innovation #15 — Agent Reputation Staking. ReputationStakingLedger converts hollow proposals into costly commitments: agents stake credits on mutations; governance failure burns the stake (STAKE-BURN-0); governance pass with fitness improvement rewards with 1.5x multiplier. World-first: skin-in-the-game economics for autonomous code evolution agents.
